name: Warding Bond

components.material: a pair of platinum rings worth 50+ GP each, which you and the target must wear for the duration

description: You bond with a willing creature you touch. While within 60 feet of you, it gains +1 AC and saving throws and Resistance to all damage, but each time it takes damage you take the same amount. Ends if you drop to 0 HP, you separate by more than 60 feet, or the spell is recast on either of you. Engine: the shared-damage bond and buff are descriptive only until a two-creature link resolver lands.
